user.title: Advanced Timer & Calendar
user.description: Set up a new instance of Advanced Timer & Calendar.

data_description.name: A unique name for this integration instance (e.g. "ATC").

telegram.title: Telegram (optional)
telegram.description: Choose how this integration should send Telegram notifications. Select **None** to skip.

telegram_direct.title: Telegram – Direct Bot (own token)
telegram_direct.description:
Enter your own Telegram bot credentials.

**How to get your Bot Token:**
1. Open Telegram and search for **@BotFather**.
2. Send `/newbot` and follow the instructions.
3. Copy the API token shown (format: `123456:ABC-DEF…`).

**How to find your Chat ID:**
Send any message to **@userinfobot** on Telegram – it replies with your chat ID.

data_description.telegram_chat_id: Your numeric Telegram chat ID (from @userinfobot, e.g. 123456789 or -100…).

telegram_ha.title: Telegram – HA telegram_bot Integration
telegram_ha.description:
This mode uses the **telegram_bot** integration already configured in Home Assistant.

Prerequisite: add `telegram_bot:` to your `configuration.yaml` or set it up via the HA UI before continuing here.

Select the notify service that belongs to your Telegram bot (or leave blank to use the default). Then enter the chat ID to receive messages.

data_description.telegram_notify_service: Select one of the detected HA notify services that belongs to your Telegram bot. If none are listed the telegram_bot integration is not yet configured.
data_description.telegram_chat_id: Your numeric Telegram chat ID (from @userinfobot, e.g. 123456789 or -100…).

voice.title: Voice notifications (optional)
voice.description: Choose a voice / TTS provider for spoken announcements. Select **None** to skip.

voice_config.title: Voice notifications – configuration
voice_config.description: Select the media player(s) that should speak the announcements and configure the volume. For TTS-based providers you can also choose the TTS engine and language.

data_description.voice_media_player: Select one or more media_player entities. For Alexa the entity ID is used to derive the matching notify service automatically.
data_description.voice_volume: Playback volume. The original volume is restored after the announcement.
data_description.voice_tts_engine: Select the TTS service to use (e.g. tts.cloud_say). Leave empty for the default.
data_description.voice_language: BCP-47 language tag, e.g. en-US or de-DE. Leave empty to use the TTS engine default.

calendar_sync.title: Calendar sync (optional)
calendar_sync.description:
Synchronise appointments with an external calendar provider. Select **None** to skip.

You will need OAuth credentials (Client ID + Client Secret) from the selected provider's developer console.

calendar_google.title: Google Calendar – credentials
calendar_google.description:
**How to obtain Google OAuth credentials:**
1. Go to [console.cloud.google.com](https://console.cloud.google.com).
2. Create a project → Enable the **Google Calendar API**.
3. Go to *Credentials* → *Create Credentials* → *OAuth client ID* (Application type: **Web application**).
4. Copy Client ID and Client Secret.

data_description.google_client_id: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console.
data_description.google_client_secret: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret. Keep this secret.

calendar_microsoft.title: Microsoft 365 – credentials
calendar_microsoft.description:
**How to obtain Microsoft Azure credentials:**
1. Go to [portal.azure.com](https://portal.azure.com) → Azure Active Directory → App registrations → New registration.
2. Set Redirect URI to `https://<YOUR-HA-URL>/auth/external/callback` (replace `<YOUR-HA-URL>` with your actual Home Assistant address, e.g. `homeassistant.local:8123` or your Nabu Casa URL).
3. Under *Certificates & secrets* create a new client secret.
4. Copy Application (client) ID and the secret value.

data_description.ms_client_secret: Azure client secret value. Keep this secret.
data_description.ms_tenant_id: Azure tenant ID or 'common' for multi-tenant apps (default: common).

settings.title: Default settings
settings.description: Configure general defaults for this integration instance.

data_description.default_reminder_minutes: How many minutes before an event the reminder notification is sent (1 – 10080).
data_description.timezone: IANA timezone name (e.g. Europe/Berlin). Leave empty to use the Home Assistant timezone.

error.credentials_required: Client ID and Client Secret are both required.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.description: Change the Telegram notification mode. Select **None** to disable.

telegram_direct.title: Telegram – Direct Bot
telegram_direct.description:
Update your Telegram bot credentials.

Need a new token? Message **@BotFather** on Telegram and use `/token`.
Need your Chat ID? Message **@userinfobot**.

telegram_ha.title: Telegram – HA Integration
telegram_ha.description: Select the HA telegram_bot notify service and your chat ID.

data_description.telegram_notify_service: HA notify service belonging to your Telegram bot.

voice.title: Voice notifications
voice.description: Change the voice / TTS provider. Select **None** to disable.

voice_config.title: Voice notifications – configuration
voice_config.description: Update media player and TTS settings.

data_description.voice_media_player: Select one or more media_player entities.
data_description.voice_volume: Playback volume. The original volume is restored after the announcement.
data_description.voice_language: BCP-47 language tag, e.g. en-US or de-DE.

calendar_sync.title: Calendar sync
calendar_sync.description: Change the external calendar sync provider. Select **None** to disable.

data_description.google_client_id: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console.

settings.title: Default settings
settings.description: Update general defaults for this instance.

data_description.default_reminder_minutes: Minutes before an event the reminder is sent (1 – 10080).
data_description.timezone: IANA timezone name. Leave empty for the Home Assistant timezone.

error.credentials_required: Client ID and Client Secret are both required.

options.mode_a: Direct Bot API (own bot token + chat ID)
options.mode_b: HA telegram_bot integration (uses existing HA config)
